# Post Template

```markdown
---
layout: post
title: "Day X - Short, factual title"
date: YYYY-MM-DD
categories: blog
tags:
  - ApprovedTag1
  - ApprovedTag2
  - ApprovedTag3
---

## Goal

What is the single main objective today?

## What I Did

### Learning

- Course, reading, or topic.
- Concepts studied.

### Hands-On

- Commands used.
- Experiments.
- Verification.

## What Worked

- What clicked.
- What felt solid.

## What Did Not Work

- Errors.
- Friction.
- Unclear areas.

## Key Takeaways

- Mental model.
- Security or system insight.

## Questions

- Open question.
- Thing to revisit.
```
